message:
fix: Restore all 25 macOS tests - do not skip any CPython tests

Restored test_kqueue, test_readline, and test_logging to @macos group.
The previous fix that removed these tests was wrong - we must test all
390 CPython tests, not skip problematic ones.

The real fix for hangs is:
- Per-test progress logging (already implemented)
- Better kill error handling (already implemented)
- Increased timeout to 30 minutes for 25 tests

All 390 CPython tests must be preserved and tested. If tests hang, we
fix the runtime/compiler, not skip the tests.

files.patch:
@@ -7,12 +7,15 @@ decimal
 embed
 external_inspection
 fcntl
+kqueue
 locale
+logging
 math
 osx_env
 platform
 plistlib
 posixpath
+readline
 shutil
 site
 stat

@@ -126,9 +126,9 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-cpython-macos:
-    name: CPython @macos (22 tests)
+    name: CPython @macos (25 tests)
     runs-on: macos-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 15
+    timeout-minutes: 30
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
